description: Bifolio with accounts, maybe communal. One of the entries is dated: Thursday night, 17 Rajab 602 AH = 27 February 1206 CE. Recto, righthand page: list of contributors. Al-Shaykh al-Thiqa and his son: 12. Al-Shaykh al-Nafīs: 10. Samawʾal: 5. Abū ʿAlī: 3. al-Makīn and his son; al-Muhadhdhab; Abū l-Ḥasan; al-Rashīd; Abū l-ʿIzz al-Ṣabbāgh; Abū l-Khayr; Abū l-Majd. The other pages contain mainly entries in Arabic script, mentioning ʿAbd al-Wahhāb; Ishāq; Ṣāliḥ; and Abū l-Faḍl al-ʿAṭṭār;
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בHUC.
